sensitivity.note: All scenarios use the same methodology and countries where data is available; only the start year changes.

alignment.description: Predictor is measured at year t; outcome summaries are medians over years t+onset through t+duration.

healthyLifeYearsMetric.note: Growth is derived as annualized percent change in HALE.

incomeGrowthMetric.metricUsed: Annualized growth of after-tax median income proxy (GNI per-capita PPP)
incomeGrowthMetric.note: Direct global after-tax median income time series is not yet integrated in this panel.

binning.method: adaptive quantile bins with anchor constraints

proxyNotes: Healthy life years level: WHO Healthy Life Expectancy (HALE).
Healthy life years growth: annualized percent growth of HALE.
Real after-tax median income level proxy: GNI per-capita PPP level.
Real after-tax median income growth proxy: annualized percent growth of GNI per-capita PPP.

spendingPerCapitaLevelTable.definition: Government expenditure per-capita PPP derived as (%GDP / 100) * GDP per-capita PPP.
